title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capital Float Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capital Float Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Capital Float Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
